name: Sopa De Entulho
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the kidney beans in water for a few hours.
2. Fill a large pan with 4 pints of water and place over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped onion and pressed cloves to the beans.
4. Add olive oil to the mixture.
5. Cook until the beans are tender.
6. Add the diced turnip, sliced carrot, and cubed pumpkin to the pot.
7. Discard the onion with the cloves still in it.
8. When the carrots are almost cooked, add the small cubes of peeled potato.
9. Chop the leaves of the turnip and cabbage by hand into medium pieces.
10. Continue cooking until all vegetables are soft.
11. Serve hot soup in bowls, adding a teaspoon of vinegar to each serving.
12. Optionally, add a dash of Tabasco for more spice.
